original_title: Three Microsoft Defender Zero-Days Actively Exploited; Two Still Unpatched
selection_reasoning: This is a powerful irony story - the very guardians meant to protect systems become the attack vector. The fact that two remain unpatched adds urgency and shows the ongoing nature of the threat. The naming (BlueHammer, RedSun, UnDefend) adds mythic quality perfect for fantasy translation.

field_note.title: When Guardians Become Gateways
field_note.subtitle: The Corruption of Those Sworn to Protect
field_note.excerpt: Three ancient vulnerabilities turn the realm's most trusted protectors against those they were sworn to defend.
field_note.epigraph: The greatest treachery comes when the shield itself becomes the sword pointed at your heart.
body_paragraphs: In the chronicles of digital warfare, few betrayals sting as deeply as when guardians turn against those they were sworn to protect. The great kingdom relied upon its Defender enchantments-powerful protective wards that were meant to watch for threats and turn them away at the gates. These guardians had earned trust through years of faithful service, standing sentinel over countless systems and networks.

But a shadowy figure known as Chaotic Eclipse had discovered something troubling: three fundamental flaws in the very essence of these protective enchantments. Like cracks in the foundation of a watchtower, these vulnerabilities-named BlueHammer, RedSun, and UnDefend-allowed hostile forces to corrupt the guardians from within. Once compromised, these protectors became unwitting accomplices, granting elevated privileges to the very threats they should have repelled.

The attackers' strategy was as elegant as it was devastating. Rather than battle the guardians directly, they whispered corruptions into the magical frameworks that powered the defensive systems. The Defender enchantments, operating with the highest levels of trust and access, unknowingly carried out the attackers' bidding. What appeared to be normal protective behavior was actually the systematic elevation of hostile forces throughout the realm.

Word of the corruption spread through the Huntress scouts, who witnessed the exploitation firsthand. Yet even as awareness grew, two of the three vulnerabilities remained unpatched-cracks still open in the kingdom's most trusted defenses. This tale reminds us that our strongest protections can become our greatest weaknesses when trust is misplaced, and that even the most vigilant guardians must themselves be watched.
